Class Other

java.lang.Object
shelter.domain.Animal
shelter.domain.Other
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Animal>
public class Other extends Animal
Represents an animal of an unclassified or uncommon species available for adoption. Extends Animal with a free-form speciesName field (e.g., "fish", "parrot", "iguana") that records exactly what kind of animal this is when no dedicated subclass exists.

  • Constructor Details

    • Other

      public Other(String id, String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, boolean vaccinated, String adopterId, String shelterId, String speciesName)
      Reconstruction constructor for deserializing an Other animal from persistent storage. Preserves the original id and all fields including the free-form species name, allowing exact round-trip restore from CSV data.
      Parameters:
      id - the pre-existing unique identifier; must not be null or blank
      name - the animal's name; must not be null or blank
      breed - the animal's breed or description; must not be null or blank
      birthday - the animal's date of birth; must not be null
      activityLevel - the animal's activity level; must not be null
      vaccinated - whether the animal has been vaccinated
      adopterId - the ID of the adopter, or null if not adopted
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter, or null if unassigned
      speciesName - a free-form name describing the species (e.g., "fish"); must not be null or blank
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if speciesName is null or blank, or any base parameter is invalid

    • Other

      public Other(String name, String breed, LocalDate birthday, ActivityLevel activityLevel, boolean vaccinated, String speciesName)
      Constructs a new Other animal with the given attributes. Use this constructor when admitting a new animal that does not have a dedicated subclass.
      Parameters:
      name - the animal's name; must not be null or blank
      breed - the animal's breed or description; must not be null or blank
      birthday - the animal's date of birth; must not be null
      activityLevel - the animal's activity level; must not be null
      vaccinated - whether the animal has been vaccinated
      speciesName - a free-form name describing the species (e.g., "fish"); must not be null or blank
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if speciesName is null or blank, or any base parameter is invalid

    • Other

      public Other(Other other)
      Copy constructor that creates a new Other animal with all field values copied from other. Inherits base Animal fields via Animal(Animal) and copies the species name.
      Parameters:
      other - the Other instance to copy; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • getSpecies

      public Species getSpecies()
      Returns the species of this animal. Each concrete subclass must return its own immutable Species constant. Always returns Species.OTHER since this class represents unclassified species.
      Specified by:
      getSpecies in class Animal
      Returns:
      the Species of this animal

    • isMatchable

      public boolean isMatchable()
      Returns whether this animal is eligible for the matching system. Returns true by default; subclasses that cannot be matched (e.g., Other) should override this to return false. Returns false because Other animals are not supported by the matching system. Matching strategies are designed for dogs, cats, and rabbits only.
      Overrides:
      isMatchable in class Animal
      Returns:
      true if this animal can be matched with adopters

    • getSpeciesName

      public String getSpeciesName()
      Returns the free-form species name describing what kind of animal this is. Examples: "fish", "parrot", "iguana".
      Returns:
      the species name string; never null or blank
